prestazioni: 6G72TT (DOHC 24V twin-turbo) engine: Full forged internals with Manley 87mm forged crankshaft, Eagle H-beam connecting rods, and JE 8.5:1 compression forged pistons for 1.5-bar boost capability. Precision Turbo PT6266 CEA ball-bearing turbochargers with custom 3.5-inch V-band downpipes and GReddy Type-S front-mount intercooler (FMIC) core (400mm x 200mm x 76mm) for optimized airflow and reduced intake temps.

Haltech Elite 2500 standalone ECU with custom 4D ignition and fuel maps, paired with AEM 30-0300 X-Series wideband O2 sensors and dual Bosch 0280155998 1000cc/min high-impedance injectors. HKS SSQV4 blow-off valves with custom 3-inch silicone couplers and Tial 50mm external wastegates for precise boost control (targeting 28-30 psi on race gas).

Full drivetrain reinforcement: OS Giken twin-plate clutch (OS-254-2LS) with billet flywheel, Cusco 2-way limited-slip differential (LSD) with 4.55:1 final gear ratio, and Driveshaft Shop 3.5-inch aluminum driveshaft with CV-style joints. Suspension overhaul with Ohlins Road & Track DFV coilovers (custom valving for 3000GT chassis), Whiteline adjustable sway bars (24mm front, 22mm rear), and SuperPro poly bushings (full kit) for reduced deflection.
estetica: Veilside Fortune 99 widebody conversion kit (full carbon fiber, 3-piece fenders with integrated vents) paired with a custom Rocket Bunny GT-S rear diffuser and carbon fiber overfenders (front: +3.5 inches, rear: +4.5 inches). Custom 3M Matte Graphite vinyl wrap with gloss black accents on the roof, mirrors, and lower rocker panels.

Custom front bumper lip by Seibon Carbon with integrated LED DRLs (Lux H8 6000K) and a JDM-spec Mitsubishi Motors badge delete (replaced with a carbon fiber emblem). Rear wing upgrade to a Voltex Type-7 (1700mm span, 3D carbon fiber) with adjustable angle mounts and integrated third brake light. Side skirts replaced with custom 3D-printed ABS units (molded to fit Fortune 99 widebody) with integrated LED side markers.

Interior: Bride Zeta III bucket seats (custom red Alcantara with black stitching) mounted on custom bolt-in subframes, paired with a NRG Innovations quick-release steering wheel hub and a Momo Prototipo 350mm suede wheel. Full custom roll cage by Custom Cages (8-point, TIG-welded 4130 chromoly) with integrated harness bar and Schroth Profi II 6-point harnesses. Custom gauge cluster with Defi Advance BF series (oil temp, oil pressure, boost, wideband AFR) and a Pioneer AVH-4200NEX head unit with Apple CarPlay/Android Auto.
